columnsSort.description: Changes how the options in the columns selector should be ordered. If not specified, the order is derived from the columns prop.

disableAddFilterButton.description: If true, the Add filter button will not be displayed.

disableRemoveAllButton.description: If true, the Remove all button will be disabled

filterFormProps.description: Props passed to each filter form.

filterModel.description: The filter model edited by the panel.

getColumnForNewFilter.description: Function that returns the next filter item to be picked as default filter.

onClose.description: Callback fired when the panel requests to be closed, e.g. after the last filter is removed. In GridFilterPanel it hides the grid filter panel; for standalone usage it is a no-op unless provided.

onFilterModelChange.description: Callback fired when the filter model is changed through the panel.

sx.description: The system prop that allows defining system overrides as well as additional CSS styles.
